title: A Bridge to the Future
article_text: My school will definitely export its new teaching brand to other countries. Our principal strongly believes that education must consist of both moral lessons and academic study. I previously thought that a master's degree would secure a better job. Nevertheless, I now insist that a combination of hard work and good character is more important. We can predict that students who abuse their opportunities will get low grades. Our school session will entirely focus on building a bridge between knowledge and real life. The ice on the lake amazes everyone because it appears so early. I will graduate next year and feel very proud. My teachers always use a combination of devices to help us learn better. A forest near our school is a perfect place for our biology class.

sentences.zh: 我们学校一定会向其他国家出口它的新教学品牌。

sentences.zh: 我们可以预测，滥用机会的学生会得到低分数。

image_prompts: A school building with a sign saying 'Export our brand' and a world map in the background.
A principal standing in front of a blackboard with words 'Moral Lessons' and 'Academic Study'.
A person holding a master's degree certificate and a job offer letter.
A student studying hard with a book titled 'Hard Work' and another titled 'Good Character'.
A student with low grades on a test paper, looking sad, with a clock showing wasted time.
A school session schedule with a bridge icon connecting 'Knowledge' and 'Real Life'.
A frozen lake with ice forming early in autumn, and surprised students watching.
A student in a graduation cap and gown, smiling proudly.
A classroom with various electronic devices like tablets and laptops on desks.
A forest near a school with students sitting on the grass having a biology lesson.
